title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock to v0.8.6

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/gvisor-tap-vsock (github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock)</summary>

### [`v0.8.6`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/releases/tag/v0.8.6)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.5...v0.8.6)

The main change in this release is a slight change of behaviour with the `gvproxy` `--debug` option. In previous releases, it was creating a `capture.pcap` file in `gvproxy`’s working directory. This was problematic for some users, as if this directory is not writable, `gvproxy` exits with an error.

Starting with 0.8.6, `--debug` will no longer dump network traffic automatically. If you need network traffic dumps, there’s a new `--pcap` option, and the path where to dump the data is configurable.

If this behaviour change is problematic for you, please file an issue so that we can revisit this in future releases.

#### What's Changed

-   gvproxy: Add --pcap option by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/501](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/501)
-   Dockerfile changes to build gvforwarder by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/460](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/460)
-   Add building image as a separate step to CI workflow by [@​vyasgun](https://redirect.github.com/vyasgun) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/498](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/498)
-   Document how gvisor-tap-vsock releases are made by [@​cfergeau](https://redirect.github.com/cfergeau) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/461](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/461)

##### Dependency Updates

-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/net from 0.37.0 to 0.38.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/499](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/499)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/crypto from 0.36.0 to 0.38.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/495](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/495) and [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/503](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/503)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sync from 0.12.0 to 0.13.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/494](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/494)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/coreos/stream-metadata-go from 0.4.5 to 0.4.7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/491](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/491) and [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/502](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/502)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/miekg/dns from 1.1.63 to 1.1.65 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/496](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/496)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.36.2 to 1.37.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/492](https://redirect.github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/pull/492)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/gvisor-tap-vsock/compare/v0.8.5...v0.8.6

</details>
